channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Katseye Break Through a Giant Pink Teddy Bear to Perform ‘Pinky Up’ at 2026 AMAs
item.description: 🎤 Step aside, teddy bear! Katseye is bringing the fun and funk to the 2026 AMAs with 'Pinky Up'! 🐻✨ #Katseye #AMA2026

item.title: “Vegas is Officially Ours”: BTS Return to Sin City as Masters of Intimacy on a Grand Scale
item.description: ✨ BTS lights up Vegas with their electrifying show! 🌟 Who's ready for this epic comeback? #BTS #VegasTakeover 🎶

item.title: Noah Kahan’s Not-That-Unlikely Everyman Stardom
item.description: 🌟 Noah Kahan bringing those everyman vibes to the top! 🎶 Who's vibing with his stardom rise? 💫 #NoahKahan #EverymanStardom

item.title: Paul McCartney Talks About Origins of New Album With Actor Paul Mescal in Amazon Short Film Streaming Now
item.description: 🚀 Dive into the creative process with music legend Paul McCartney and actor Paul Mescal in this must-watch Amazon short film! 🎬🎶 #PaulMcCartney #PaulMescal

item.title: Drake Becomes First Artist To Hold Top Three Albums On Billboard 200
item.description: 🎉 Drake dominating the charts like a boss! 🚀🔥 Who else is feeling the 3peat vibes? 🎶 #DrakeIsOnFire #ChartTopper
